name: vitte-studio
description: Full tooling for Vitte and Vit: grammar, LSP, debug, tasks, tests, explorer, bench & playground.

viewsWelcome.contents:
# Vitte Offline

The language server is offline.

- $(question) **Explain Offline** → `vscode:command:vitte.offline.explain`
- $(settings-gear) **Settings** → `vscode:command:workbench.action.openSettings?%5B%22vitte.server%22%5D`

commands.title: Vitte: Run Benchmarks and Open Report

walkthroughs.title: Vitte Quickstart
walkthroughs.description: Detect the toolchain and run your first build.

steps.title: Detect the Vitte toolchain
steps.description: Use [Vitte: Detect Toolchain](command:vitte.detectToolchain) to auto-discover the CLI binaries or configure them manually.

steps.title: Run the onboarding setup
steps.description: Trigger [Vitte: Quick Actions](command:vitte.quickActions) again and choose **Run full setup** to chain toolchain detection and a build in one go.

vitte.trace.server.description: Enable tracing for the Vitte language server.

vitte.serverPath.description: Absolute path to a custom Vitte server binary. Empty = use the bundled server.

vitte.server.offline.description: Do not start the language server (offline mode).

vitte.server.autoRetry.description: Automatically retry starting the server when offline.

vitte.server.autoRetryBaseMs.description: Base delay (ms) before retrying server start when offline.

vitte.server.autoRetryMaxMs.description: Max delay (ms) for retry backoff when offline.

vitte.requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout (ms) for LSP requests (completion, hover, etc.).

vitte.requestMaxConcurrent.description: Max concurrent LSP requests before backpressure.

vitte.indexerMaxRssMB.description: Max RSS memory (MB) before skipping index updates.

vitte.indexerCacheEnabled.description: Persist index cache to speed up restarts.

vitte.traceSampleRate.description: Sampling rate for verbose trace metrics.

vitte.enterprise.strict.description: Enable global enterprise strict mode and quality gates.

vitte.reliability.maxRestartAttempts.description: Maximum automatic restart attempts in reliability guard.

vitte.reliability.baseRetryMs.description: Base retry delay for reliability guard.

vitte.reliability.maxRetryMs.description: Maximum retry delay for reliability guard.

vitte.semanticBudget.completionP95Ms.description: Semantic diagnostics budget for completion p95.

vitte.semanticBudget.hoverP95Ms.description: Semantic diagnostics budget for hover p95.

vitte.semanticBudget.renameP95Ms.description: Semantic diagnostics budget for rename p95.

vitte.semanticBudget.referencesP95Ms.description: Semantic diagnostics budget for references p95.

vitte.policy.path.description: Path to policy-as-code file used by enterprise checks.

vitte.suggestions.adaptiveRanking.description: Enable adaptive completion ranking based on prefix/context/usage.

vitte.suggestions.dynamicBudget.description: Enable dynamic top-N completion budget according to latency/load.

vitte.suggestions.showExplainLabels.description: Append short why-labels to completion details.

vitte.suggestions.showMatchHighlights.description: Append compact match hints (prefix/contains/fuzzy positions) to completion details.

vitte.suggestions.shadowRankingEnabled.description: Run a shadow ranking profile in background for A/B comparison metrics (no UX impact).

vitte.suggestions.shadowRankingVariant.description: Variant used by shadow ranking A/B metrics.

vitte.suggestions.churnPenaltyEnabled.description: Penalize suggestions that move too much between consecutive refreshes for the same request.

vitte.suggestions.churnPenaltyWeight.description: Weight applied to churn penalty during ranking.

vitte.suggestions.typeBudgetEnabled.description: Apply per-kind budget for completion list (function/variable/snippet).

vitte.suggestions.functionBudgetRatio.description: Target ratio of function/method suggestions in final completion list.

vitte.suggestions.variableBudgetRatio.description: Target ratio of variable/field/property suggestions in final completion list.

vitte.suggestions.snippetBudgetRatio.description: Target ratio of snippet suggestions in final completion list.

vitte.suggestions.topN.description: Target number of completion suggestions when system is healthy.

vitte.suggestions.minN.description: Minimum completion suggestion budget under degraded latency/load.

vitte.suggestions.slowMs.description: Latency threshold (ms) considered slow for dynamic suggestion budgeting.

vitte.suggestions.rankingDeadlineMs.description: CPU deadline (ms) for completion ranking pass; beyond this the ranker falls back to neutral ordering.

vitte.suggestions.streaming.description: Enable streaming completion (local first paint + progressive LSP enrichment).

vitte.suggestions.streamingFirstPaintMs.description: First paint timeout budget (ms) before returning local streaming suggestions.

vitte.suggestions.streamingLocalBatchSiz.description: Maximum number of immediate local suggestions in streaming mode.

vitte.suggestions.streamingCacheTtlMs.description: TTL (ms) for progressive completion cache used between suggest refreshes.

vitte.suggestions.streamingAutoRefresh.description: Auto refresh suggest widget when background LSP completion arrives.

vitte.suggestions.autoRefreshDebounceMin.description: Minimum debounce (ms) before triggering auto-refresh of suggest widget.

vitte.suggestions.autoRefreshDebounceMax.description: Maximum adaptive debounce (ms) based on typing speed before auto-refresh.

vitte.suggestions.lspHardTimeoutMs.description: Hard timeout (ms) for LSP completion call before local/cache fallback is kept.

vitte.suggestions.negativeCacheTimeoutTh.description: Number of consecutive LSP completion timeouts before temporary negative cache activation.

vitte.suggestions.negativeCacheHoldMs.description: Duration (ms) for negative cache hold after repeated LSP completion timeouts.

vitte.suggestions.highLoadThreshold.description: System load threshold triggering ultra-fast prefix-only local fallback.

vitte.suggestions.lintGuard.description: When the current line has diagnostics errors, filter risky completion entries (snippet/multiline/non-prefix).

vitte.suggestions.diagnosticContextFilte.description: Filter suggestions using diagnostic message context on the current line.

vitte.suggestions.diagnosticContextMinTo.description: Minimum token length extracted from diagnostics for context-based suggestion filtering.

vitte.suggestions.securityGuardEnabled.description: Enable security guard filtering for risky completion patterns.

vitte.suggestions.securityBlockedPattern.description: Regex patterns (case-insensitive) blocked by the completion security guard.

vitte.suggestions.workspaceWhitelistPatt.description: If non-empty, only suggestions matching at least one regex pattern (case-insensitive) are kept.

vitte.suggestions.workspaceBlacklistPatt.description: Suggestions matching any of these regex patterns (case-insensitive) are removed.

vitte.suggestions.intentMode.description: Suggestion intent mode used to reweight completion ranking.

vitte.suggestions.stickyTopEnabled.description: Boost recently accepted suggestions for the current document near the top of the list.

vitte.suggestions.stickyTopCount.description: Number of recently accepted labels (per document) considered for sticky-top boosting.

vitte.suggestions.cachePrefixTtlMs.description: TTL (ms) for exact prefix-level completion cache.

vitte.suggestions.cacheMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of entries per completion cache map (LRU).

vitte.suggestions.cacheSoftMemoryMb.description: Soft memory threshold (MB). When exceeded, caches are trimmed progressively.

vitte.suggestions.idlePrefetch.description: Prefetch completions around the cursor while idle to warm caches.

vitte.suggestions.prefetchDirectional.description: Prioritize directional prefetch around cursor instead of symmetric line scan.

vitte.suggestions.prefetchDirection.description: Direction preference for directional idle prefetch.

vitte.suggestions.prefetchLineRadius.description: Idle prefetch radius around active line (line +/- N).

vitte.suggestions.pagination.description: Enable paged completion budgeting with progressive load on repeated invoke.

vitte.suggestions.pageSize.description: Number of completion items returned per page.

vitte.suggestions.maxPages.description: Maximum page escalation for the same completion request key.

vitte.suggestions.pageResetMs.description: Reset paging state when repeated invoke happens after this delay (ms).

vitte.suggestions.ghostTextTop1Stable.description: Enable ghost text preview from top-1 suggestion when it remains stable across refreshes.

vitte.suggestions.ghostTextStableThresho.description: Number of consecutive stable top-1 observations before ghost text is shown.

vitte.suggestions.ghostTextMaxAgeMs.description: Maximum age (ms) of a stable top-1 candidate kept for ghost text preview.

vitte.features.inlayHints.description: Enable inlay hints (inferred types, parameters, aliases).

vitte.inlayHints.aliasHints.description: Show suggested alias inlay hints for imports.

vitte.diagnosticsBudget.dynamicThrottleF.description: Dynamic throttle multiplier when budget is exceeded.

vitte.format.onSave.description: Run Vitte document formatter automatically after saving Vitte/Vit files.

vitte.debug.program.description: Path to the vitte-runtime binary (leave blank for auto-detection).

vitte.toolchain.root.description: Root directory of the Vitte toolchain (prefix for binaries).

vitte.toolchainPath.description: (Legacy) Deprecated fallback for the toolchain root.

vitte.runtime.path.description: Path to the runtime binary (alternative to debug.program).

vitte.lint.maxLineLength.description: Maximum line length before emitting a lint hint.

vitte.lint.allowTabs.description: Allow tab characters in source files.

vitte.lint.allowTrailingWhitespace.description: Allow trailing whitespace at end of line.

vitte.lint.enableStyleRules.description: Enable style-related lint rules (naming, module path conventions).

vitte.quickActions.sequences.description: Define custom sequences for the “Vitte: Quick” command. Each entry triggers multiple VS Code commands sequentially.

id.description: Unique identifier for the sequence (used for history/favorites).

description.description: Optional description displayed under the title.

detail.description: Optional detail text (for instance a summary of the steps). Defaults to the command list.

command.description: Full identifier of the VS Code command to execute.

args.description: Optional arguments forwarded to the command.

steps.description: Ordered list of commands to execute.

vitte.quickActions.defaults.description: Override built-in Quick Actions (build, run, bench, diagnostics, etc.). Each property key matches an action id (e.g., "build", "bench").

label.description: Custom label displayed in the palette.

detail.description: Extra detail text displayed on the item.

command.description: Command identifier to execute instead of the default.

actions.description: Override the action with a custom list of steps (same format as quickActions.sequences).

args.description: Optional arguments forwarded to the command.

default.label: Run
default.tooltip: Build and run the entry point (vitte.run)

vitte.commandShortcuts.description: Customize the shortcuts shown in the status bar and startup prompt. Each entry defines a label, command, and optional icon/tooltip.

command.description: Identifier of the VS Code command to execute.

tooltip.description: Tooltip displayed when hovering the button.

statusBar.description: Show this shortcut as a status bar button.

startup.description: Include this shortcut in the startup toast.

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server && npm run build:servercopy
scripts.build:servercopy: mkdir -p out server/out && (cp server/out/src/server.js out/server.js || true) && (cp -R server/out/src/* server/out/ || true)
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules package-lock.json dist && npm ci
